description: You can never go wrong with a baseball cap, and even more so you are on the right track if it's a timberland one made of organic cotton! Perfect for every season and stylish to the hilt, it adds that regal touch to all your outfits.Unstructured six panel cap made of 100% organic heavy garment washed cotton twill for durability, sweat-free comfort and easy maintenanceEyelets on the crown for enhnaced ventilationAdjustable leather backstrap with a butterfly closure for a customised FitBrand name embroidered in matte cotton on the front crown above the visorPre-curved visor to protect the face from elementsCap careHand wash in luke warm water using a mild detergent Drip dry in shade
